TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Laos Itini i 18 00 N, 105 00 E, noAsiya ko Laos. Polong no sekalay i 236,800 sq km "saka 84 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 230,800 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 6,000 sq km " Polong i 7,019,073 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 10.60%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 67.90%, malo no roma to a sera 21.50%. siyoto O (((Vientiane)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakatosa ko safaw 2 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Bounnhang Vorachith , patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 22 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: …ĺao~us itini i ** ** n, *** ** …ô, no~uasija ko~u …ĺao~us. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i ***,*** s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i *,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((b~vi…ôntian…ô)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakato~usa ko~u safaw * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i b~b~vo~uo~u~unnńßaŇč b~vo~ura ¶ńßitńß , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Laos Itini i 18 00 N, 105 00 E, noAsiya ko Laos. Polong no sekalay i 236,800 sq km "saka 84 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 230,800 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 6,000 sq km " Polong i 7,019,073 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 10.60%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 67.90%, malo no roma to a sera 21.50%. siyoto O (((Vientiane)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakatosa ko safaw 2 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Bounnhang Vorachith , patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 22 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

" "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i *,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((b~vi…ôntian…ô)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakato~usa ko~u safaw * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i b~b~vo~uo~u~unnńßaŇč b~vo~ura ¶ńßitńß , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
